abstract: An atom that describes a single object.
overview:
## Overview

An object sample atom describes a single object, including information about the default viewing angles and the view settings. The structure of an object sample atom is defined by the `QTVRObjectSampleAtom` data type:

items.description: The major version number of the file format.
items.name: majorVersion

items.description: The minor version number of the file format.
items.name: minorVersion

items.description: The movie controller type.
items.name: movieType

items.description: The number of view states of the object.
items.name: viewStateCount

items.description: The 1-based index of the default view state.
items.name: defaultViewState

items.description: The 1-based index of the mouse-down view state.
items.name: mouseDownViewState

items.description: The total movie duration of all image frames contained in an object’s view.
items.name: viewDuration

items.description: The number of columns in the object image array.
items.name: columns

items.description: The number of rows in the object image array.
items.name: rows

items.description: The mouse motion scale factor.
items.name: mouseMotionScale

items.description: The minimum pan angle, in degrees.
items.name: minPan

items.description: The maximum pan angle, in degrees.
items.name: maxPan

items.description: The default pan angle, in degrees.
items.name: defaultPan

items.description: The minimum tilt angle, in degrees.
items.name: minTilt

items.description: The maximum tilt angle, in degrees.
items.name: maxTilt

items.description: The default tilt angle, in degrees.
items.name: defaultTilt

items.description: The minimum field of view to which the object can zoom.
items.name: minFieldOfView

items.description: The image field of view, in degrees, for the entire object.
items.name: fieldOfView

items.description: The default field of view for the object.
items.name: defaultFieldOfView

items.description: The default horizontal view center.
items.name: defaultViewCenterH

items.description: The default vertical view center.
items.name: defaultViewCenterV

items.description: The view rate.
items.name: viewRate

items.description: The frame rate.
items.name: frameRate

items.description: A set of 32-bit flags that encode information about the animation settings of the object.
items.name: animationSettings

items.description: A set of 32-bit flags that encode information about the control settings of the object.
items.name: controlSettings

title: Object sample atom
